topics.headline: The Only Bean Eyes Target Expansion for Bean Snacks
topics.summary: The Only Bean is launching products in Target stores to revitalize the bean snack category. The move positions the brand to capture growing consumer interest in protein-rich, plant-based snacking options.
topics.why_trending: Plant-based snacking continues to gain momentum as consumers seek healthier, protein-packed alternatives.
titles: The Only Bean Bets on Target to Revitalize a Sleepy Snack Set

topics.headline: Tom Brady Launches Premium Coconut Water via Gopuff
topics.summary: Tom Brady has partnered with delivery platform Gopuff to introduce Good Nut, a premium coconut water brand. The exclusive launch leverages Brady's celebrity endorsement to enter the competitive functional beverage market.
topics.why_trending: Celebrity-backed beverage launches and direct-to-consumer delivery models are reshaping how brands reach consumers.
titles: Tom Brady Teams With Gopuff to Launch Good Nut Premium Coconut Water
Tom Brady, Gopuff launch exclusive coconut water

topics.headline: Katie's Expands Into Pasta and Frozen Desserts at Target
topics.summary: Katie's is debuting pasta bakes, sauces, and premium ice cream lines at Target stores. The expansion signals growth for the brand beyond its existing product categories.
topics.why_trending: Emerging food brands are securing major retail partnerships to accelerate distribution and market penetration.
titles: Distribution: Katie’s Debuts Pasta Bakes and Sauces at Target; Plus Evergreen, Natty Ice Cream

topics.headline: UNFI Boosts Profits Despite Third-Quarter Sales Decline
topics.summary: United Natural Foods improved profitability in Q3 despite a sales drop, indicating stronger operational efficiency and margin management. The distributor's performance reflects challenges in the natural and specialty foods sector.
topics.why_trending: Supply chain consolidators are becoming more efficient, a key metric for investor confidence amid retail headwinds.
titles: UNFI Profit Surges Despite Sales Decline
UNFI’s sales drop in Q3, but profitability improves

topics.headline: Huel Launches High-Protein Ramen Post-Danone Acquisition
topics.summary: Huel has introduced a high-protein ramen product following its acquisition by Danone. The launch diversifies Huel's nutrition-focused portfolio with a mainstream comfort food format.
topics.why_trending: Major food conglomerates are using acquisitions to enter fast-growing functional nutrition categories.
titles: Months After Danone Acquisition, Huel Debuts High-Protein Ramen
